creator: sylvain@sylvaingarrigues.com
text:
Sure I have it. Never had problem in the past thought cross-compiling on this machine. Maybe I upgraded to a bogus qemu-user-static recently?

@sbruno, how can I help? (I wish I could downgrade to test).
